name: d3-easygraph
description: A batteries-included D3 v7 charting library: lines, areas, zoom, crosshair, stacked/grouped bars, and heatmaps, with a responsive container-driven width.

scripts.build: terser src/d3.easygraph.core.js src/d3.easygraph.units.js src/d3.easygraph.line.js src/d3.easygraph.bars.js src/d3.easygraph.heatmap.js -c -m --comments false -o dist/d3.easygraph.min.js && cp src/d3.easygraph.css dist/d3.easygraph.css

author: Lars Schumann <larsi.org@gmail.com>
